summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The abrdn Focused U.S. Small Cap Active ETF (AFSC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively invests in US small-caps the adviser perceives to be high quality and of good fundamental standing. AFSC was launched on Feb 18, 2025 and is issued by aberdeen.

data.title: Small-Cap Stocks Are Crushing the S&P 500. Here Are 4 Active ETFs to Play the Rally.
data.text: It's a small world after all. Small-caps stocks, that is.

news.t: Small-Cap Stocks Are Crushing the S&P 500. Here Are 4 Active ETFs to Play the Rally.

holdings.infoBox: AFSC is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are American Healthcare REIT stock at 3.54%, Ameris Bancorp at 3.01%, Ligand Pharmaceuticals at 2.96%, Wintrust Financial at 2.93%, and Quaker Chemical at 2.92%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
